2606.31156.title: One Retrieval to Cover Them All: Co-occurrence-Aware Knowledge Base Reorganization for Session-Level RAG
2606.31156.paper_summary: RAG systems retrieve documents optimized for answering one query at a time. Yet enterprise users arrive with sessions, that is, coherent episodes of related questions that span semantically distant parts of the knowledge base. We show that a single retrieval call over a standard knowledge base covers only 41% of a user's session-level information need. To close this gap, we reorganize the KB offline using co-occurrence-aware clustering and expand retrieval candidates through cluster neighborhoods at query time. On WixQA (6,221 enterprise support articles), our method raises single-query session coverage to 58% (+17% absolute; 95% CI: [14.1, 20.4]), reduces retrieval calls to 70% coverage by 34%, and compresses the KB to 20% of its original size, all consistently across four embedding models and six functional domains. We argue that session-level coverage, not single-query recall, should be the primary metric for enterprise RAG evaluation.
2606.31156.paper_summary_zh: RAG 系統檢索的文件是針對一次查詢進行優化的。然後，企業用戶通常會帶來會話，也就是一系列相關問題的連貫情節，這些問題跨越了知識庫中語義上相距甚遠的部分。我們顯示，對於標準知識庫的單次檢索調用僅能涵蓋用戶會話層級信息需求的 41%。為了縮小這一差距，我們使用共現感知聚類在離線時重新組織知識庫，並在查詢時通過聚類鄰域擴展檢索候選項。在 WixQA（6,221 篇企業支持文章）上，我們的方法將單查詢會話的覆蓋率提高到 58%（絕對增加 17%；95% 置信區間：[14.1, 20.4]），將檢索調用減少到 70% 的覆蓋率降低了 34%，並將知識庫壓縮到其原始大小的 20%，這在四個嵌入模型和六個功能領域中都一致。我們主張，會話層級的覆蓋率，而非單查詢的召回率，應該是企業 RAG 評估的主要指標。
2606.31156.author: Shivam Ratnakar et.al.
2606.31156.authors: Shivam Ratnakar, Yixuan Zhu, Cecilia Cheng, Chaya Vijayakumar
